events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need decide pass/fail. Scenario: rocks against pipe (no bedding sand). Heavy industrial, pipe bedding & backfill. Reference IPC 306? IPC likely International Plumbing Code? IPC 306 maybe bedding? Actually IPC 306 is "Protection of Pipe and Tubing"? Need recall. IPC 306 maybe "Trenching, bedding and backfill"? Let's think. International Plumbing Code Chapter 3 has section 306 "Protection of Pipe and Tubing"? Section 306.1: "Piping shall be supported...". But IPC 306 maybe "Bedding and Backfill"? Let's search memory. IPC Chapter 3 General Regulations. Section 305: Pipe and Tube Joints. Section 306: Protection of Pipe and Tubing. 306.1: "Pipe and tubing shall be installed free of contacts with any material that could have a deleterious effect." 306.2: "Where pipe and tubing is installed in or beneath a concrete slab, it shall be..." Hmm. But scenario says rocks against pipe (no bedding sand). That violates bedding requirements: pipe must be bedded in sand or select material to prevent damage, point loading, corrosion. So fail. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Risk: high? Rocks against pipe can cause damage, leaks, corrosion. In industrial site maybe critical if pressurized. But pipe bedding & backfill, rough-complete. Risk high. Percent complete maybe 70? Value 0. Sound_source etc default empty string/0. Workable empty list. Findings: pipe installed without required bedding sand; native rock in direct contact with pipe; potential point loading and damage. Actions: remove backfill/rock around pipe, install specified bedding material, re-backfill in lifts per spec, inspect before cover. Rationale: bedding required to protect pipe from rocks and provide uniform support; direct rock contact is non-compliant. References: project specs, IPC 306. Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.

    "Pipe installed with native rock in direct contact; no bedding sand or select bedding material placed beneath or around the pipe.",
    "Direct rock contact creates point loading and abrasion risk that can damage the pipe wall or coating."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Excavate and remove rock backfill around the affected pipe section.",
    "Install specified bedding material (e.g., clean sand or select granular bedding) to provide uniform support and protection.",
    "Re-backfill in controlled lifts per project specifications and IPC requirements.",
    "Inspect bedding and backfill placement before final cover."
  ],
  "rationale": "Bedding material is required to provide uniform support and to prevent rocks or other harmful material from contacting the pipe. Direct rock-to-pipe contact violates the project specifications and IPC 306 protection requirements, making the installation defective and non-compliant.",
  "references": ["project specs", "IPC 306"]
}
